    have h_F_plus : MeasureTheory.Integrable F⁺ ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))).prod (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := by
      apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.mono (g := fun p ↦ Real.log (max ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ 1) + Real.log 2)
      · apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.add

        apply MeasureTheory.AEStronglyMeasurable.max
        · exact (ρ₃' h).norm
        · exact measurable_const.aestronglyMeasurable
      · filter_upwards with p
        have : ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1) - circleMap 0 1 p.2‖ ≤ ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ + 1 := by
           trans ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ + ‖circleMap 0 1 p.2‖; exact norm_sub_le _ _; simp
        have log_le := Real.log_le_log (by simp) (max_le_max this (le_refl 1))
        refine log_le.trans ?_
        by_cases ha : ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ ≤ 1
        · rw [max_eq_right ha, max_eq_left (by positivity)];
          calc Real.log (‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ + 1) ≤ Real.log 2 := Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by linarith)
             _ ≤ 0 + Real.log 2 := by simp
             _ = Real.log 1 + Real.log 2 := by simp
        · rw [max_eq_left (le_of_not_le ha), max_eq_left (by positivity)]
          calc Real.log (‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ + 1) ≤ Real.log (2 * ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖) := Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by nlinarith)
             _ = Real.log ‖f (circleMap 0 r p.1)‖ + Real.log 2 := by rw [mul_comm, Real.log_mul (by norm_num) (by linarith)]

    apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.mono (g := fun x ↦ 2 * (∫ y in Ioc 0 (2 * π), F⁺ (x, y)) - (2 * π) * Real.log (max ‖f (circleMap 0 r x)‖ 1))
    · apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.sub
      · apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.const_mul; exact MeasureTheory.Integrable.integral_prod_left h_F_plus
      · apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.const_mul; exact h_log_plus
    · exact MeasureTheory.Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable (by fun_prop)
    · filter_upwards with x
      rw [←MeasureTheory.integral_sub (MeasureTheory.Integrable.const_mul (h_F_plus.comp_ae_eq (measurable_fst.aecover (ae_of_all _ (fun _ ↦ rfl)))) 2) ?_]
      · rw [←MeasureTheory.integral_mul_left]
        have int_eq : ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * π), F (x, y) = 2 * π * Real.log (max ‖f (circleMap 0 r x)‖ 1) := by
           rw [←circleAverage_eq_integral_div_two_pi (μ := MeasureTheory.volume) _ real_two_pi_pos.ne', circleAverage_log_norm_sub_const_eq_posLog]
           field_simp [real_two_pi_pos.ne']
        rw [int_eq, MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae]
        filter_upwards with y

        · simp [v, hv, max_eq_right (le_of_not_ge hv)]; rw [abs_of_neg (Real.log_neg (by positivity) hv)]; ring

        exact this
